alphazero.provenance_note: By design — self-scored calls, not a validated edge. Stays false until scorecard proves calibration.

todays_output.regime_interpretation: NQ weak vs ES — rotation OUT of tech. Tech-led longs suspect.

macro_snapshot.consumer_sentiment_flag: LOW — below 50 historically signals consumer stress

notes: 14 calls is below minimum threshold for statistical significance
Directional hit rate of 0.786 is promising but cannot be trusted at n=14
Regime accuracy 0.314 is at random-baseline for a 3-class problem — watch closely
Opus brain has not fired yet (credits) — all 14 calls were deterministic fallback

confidence_multiplier.carry_engine_hookup: staged — one-line switch, not yet flipped

blockers.impact: Opus synthesis not firing — running deterministic fallback

alphazero.grade_rationale: Infrastructure correct and honest. Real data flowing. Scorecard accumulating. Grade capped at B because Opus never fired and n=14 is pre-statistical.

board.na_reason: carry-not-aligned — handled by REVERSAL hard rule

stockfish.pattern_summary: High-ATR (any hold stage) + late-hold lower-ATR (underwater-to-modest) → EXIT_NOW. All carry-aligned. Economically coherent.

caveats.description: Gross returns only. All 9 divergences are carry-aligned — positive carry income favors holding. Mis-modelled financing (TICK-024, ~10x too small, sign flip EUR-short) means net-of-carry recompute could erase some or all divergences.
Regime-window robustness 0.854 < 0.90 bar. Optimal policy is somewhat sensitive to ATR-percentile window choice (60d vs 252d).
Forward window thin — 246 members, 23 common cells. Agreement of 0.870 is encouraging but not decisive.
Vol innovations are ~white. Structure is excursion geometry conditioned on entry regime, NOT intra-trade vol momentum. Weaker but still usable claim.

next_step.action: Recompute identical table on NET returns using TICK-024 corrected financing model
next_step.type: SAME HARNESS — not a new experiment, not a new preregistration
next_step.decider: If 9 divergences survive net-of-carry AND regime-window robustness clears 0.90 → CONFIRMED. If they collapse → data-ceiling thesis confirmed.
next_step.timing: After TICK-024 financing fix is merged; before or at July 28

stockfish.grade_rationale: Airtight methodology, clean harness, coherent economic finding. Capped at B+ because one known cost-model flaw stands between PROVISIONAL and CONFIRMED, and that flaw is directionally adverse to the result.
stockfish.ledger_verdict: NOT_SEALED — PROVISIONAL, left for Colin to adjudicate per research method
